text.title: idea-generation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for idea-generation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Defaulting to "AI x [anything]" without genuine domain fit or a specific underserved user problem.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs over-produce this pattern. "AI-powered X" is not a business idea; it is a feature. The underlying job must be validated independently.

failure-mode.description: Waiting for the perfect idea before starting research.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inspiration does not precede research; research produces inspiration. Generate 10+ ideas, score them, pick the best one to explore further.

failure-mode.description: Running only one or two of the seven frameworks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different frameworks surface different idea classes. Skipping frameworks locks the output into a single idea type.

failure-mode.description: Not documenting every idea, even obviously bad ones.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The rejected list compounds over months. Patterns in rejected ideas often reveal the best path forward 6-12 months later.

failure-mode.description: Quoting global TAM as Market Size instead of ICP segment size.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A $100B global market is irrelevant for a solopreneur product. Constrain Market Size to the actual ICP segment the product can realistically reach.
